hooks.command: file="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$file" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.css|*.md) npx prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null ;; esac
file="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$file" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) cd /data/home/geminitwang/code/sop_note/app && npx eslint --no-warn-ignored --max-warnings 0 "$file" 2>&1 | head -20 ;; esac
